How it works

Four steps to an unforgettable gift

From purchase to experience — everything handled for you.

1
Choose your box

Browse our curated collection for every occasion

2
Gift it instantly

Sent by email with your personal message or video

3
Activate the code

Unlock a world of experiences with a unique voucher

4
Live the moment

Book and enjoy — a memory that lasts forever

Our best boxes of the moment

Handpicked experiences loved by our community

FAQ

Frequently asked questions about WowBox

🛒 Purchase & Boxes

Browse our collection, choose a box, add to cart and complete checkout. Your digital gift box is delivered immediately by email.
Yes! During checkout you can send immediately or schedule for a specific date — perfect for birthdays and anniversaries.
All major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Paystack. All transactions are secure and encrypted.
Yes! During checkout add a personalised text message, or add a video message as an optional extra for an even more special touch.

📦 E-Box Delivery

WowBox is fully digital — all gift boxes are delivered by email as an E-Box. Instant delivery anywhere in South Africa.
The recipient receives a beautifully designed email with their unique voucher code. They visit wowbox.co.za, enter their code, and choose their experience.

🎟️ Voucher Activation

Go to wowbox.co.za, click "Redeem a Box", enter your unique voucher code and unlock all the experiences in your box.
You can activate without an account, but creating a free account lets you save your box, track your booking and access your voucher anytime.
Check your email inbox for the original gift email. If you can't find it, contact us at support@wowbox.co.za with your name and purchase details.

📅 Booking Experiences

After activating your voucher, browse the experiences in your box, pick one, select date & time, and confirm your booking directly on the platform.
Each experience specifies the guests included (Solo, Duo, or Group). For additional guests, contact the experience provider directly.
Yes, subject to availability. Contact the experience provider at least 48 hours before your booking. Each partner has their own cancellation policy.

⏳ Validity & Expiration

WowBox vouchers are valid for 12 months from purchase date. We send reminder emails before expiry.
Expired vouchers cannot be reactivated. If you have exceptional circumstances, contact our support team.

💰 Refunds & Cancellations

Unopened vouchers (not yet activated) can be refunded within 30 days of purchase. Once activated, refunds are subject to the experience provider's policy.
Yes, within 14 days of purchase and before activation, you can request an exchange for a box of equal or greater value. Contact support@wowbox.co.za.

🎬 Video Message

For a small extra fee, record a personal video message that the recipient watches when they open their gift.
Up to 2 minutes. Record directly in your browser or upload a pre-recorded video.

🤝 For Partners

Click "List Your Experience" in the footer. Create a partner account, submit your experience for review and our team will contact you within 5 business days.
Listing is free. WowBox takes a small commission on completed bookings. Premium features are available via our Pro Plan.
In your Partner Portal, go to "My Bookings". When a customer arrives, click "Validate" and enter their voucher code to mark it as used.

Still have a question?

Contact Us

We usually respond within 24 hours.

Find the perfect gift box! Browse our 12 curated collections and explore over 140,000 activities from our partners. Choose between instant e-delivery or premium physical packaging.

Terms & Conditions

WowBox Terms and Conditions of Sale — Effective 27 April 2026

WowBox is a trading name of RC Tradeworx Holdings (Pty) Ltd, reg. 2025/174107/07, 29 North Road, Benoni, Gauteng, 1514. Contact: info@wowbox.co.za

1. Eligibility. You must be at least 18 years old to purchase a WowBox product. Persons under 18 may only participate when accompanied by a parent or legal guardian. No refund shall be provided if admission is refused due to age.

2. About WowBox. WowBox acts solely as an intermediary between customers and independent third-party experience providers ("Participating Partners"). WowBox does not own, operate, or supervise any experience or venue provided by Participating Partners.

3. Orders & Acceptance. An order is only accepted once payment has been successfully processed and the WowBox product issued. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order at our sole discretion.

4. Pricing & Payment. All prices are in ZAR and include VAT where applicable. Payment must be received in full before delivery.

5. Delivery. Digital products are delivered electronically to the email address provided. Physical delivery timeframes are estimates only. WowBox is not liable for courier delays.

6. Voucher Activation & Redemption. Each product contains a unique activation code. Activated vouchers are non-transferable unless expressly permitted.

7. Booking & Availability. All experiences are subject to availability determined solely by the Participating Partner. WowBox does not guarantee availability of any experience, date, or time.

8. Experience Changes. Participating Partners may modify, substitute, or discontinue any experience at any time. WowBox may substitute an equivalent experience where reasonably possible.

9. Validity. Vouchers are valid for the period stated. Expired vouchers may not be redeemed unless required by law.

10. Participating Partner Responsibility. Partners are solely responsible for delivering the experience, maintaining licences, health & safety, insurance, and service quality. Complaints must be addressed directly with the Partner.

11. Insurance. WowBox does not provide any form of insurance. Customers are solely responsible for obtaining any insurance they deem necessary.

12. Assumption of Risk. Certain experiences involve inherent risks including physical injury or death. Participation is voluntary. You assume all risks associated with participation. WowBox shall not be liable for any injury, loss, or death arising from participation.

13. Fitness to Participate. You are solely responsible for ensuring all participants are fit to participate. Partners may refuse participation where unsafe. No refund shall be due in such circumstances.

14. Refusal of Admission. No refund, exchange, or compensation shall be payable where a Participating Partner refuses admission due to: age restrictions; failure to present valid ID; intoxication; inappropriate behaviour; safety concerns; dress code violations; medical concerns; or any other lawful reason.

15. Additional Costs. Unless stated otherwise, the following are excluded: transportation, accommodation, meals, gratuities, insurance, taxes, personal expenses, and optional extras.

16. Cancellation & Refunds. Subject to applicable South African consumer protection laws: activated, redeemed, expired, and partially used vouchers are non-refundable. Digital products may not be refunded once delivered, except where required by law.

17. Lost / Stolen Vouchers. WowBox is not responsible for lost, stolen, or unauthorised use of vouchers. Treat your voucher like cash.

18. Fraud & Abuse. WowBox reserves the right to cancel any order or account where fraud or abuse is suspected.

19. Limitation of Liability. To the fullest extent permitted by law, WowBox shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability shall never exceed the purchase price paid.

20. Force Majeure. WowBox is not liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control including natural disasters, pandemics, government action, or cyberattacks.

21. Indemnity. You agree to indemnify WowBox and its directors, officers, and employees from any claims arising from your breach of these Terms, misuse of any product, or participation in any experience.

22. Intellectual Property. All content on the WowBox website is owned by or licensed to WowBox. No content may be copied or used without prior written consent.

23. Privacy. Your personal information will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and applicable South African data protection laws.

24. Governing Law. These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the South African courts.

25. Amendments. WowBox may amend these Terms at any time. The version published at the time of purchase shall apply.

You must accept the Terms & Conditions to continue.
Your payment is processed securely by Paystack. WowBox never stores your card details.

Unique Booking Reference —

Present this code at the venue to redeem your experience

How to use your voucher
  1. Call ahead — contact the venue by phone to confirm your booking date and time before visiting.
  2. Bring this voucher — print it or show it on your phone at the venue for validation.
  3. Enjoy! — present your unique booking reference code on arrival.
This voucher is non-transferable. Must be presented on arrival. Cancellations must be made 48h before. WowBox T&Cs apply.

Turn your space into an
unforgettable experience

Join South Africa's leading gift experience platform. Reach thousands of premium customers actively seeking hotels, restaurants, spas, safaris and more.

Who can list on WowBox?
From boutique hotels to bush lodges — if you offer an exceptional experience, you belong here.
🏨 Hotels & Lodges
🍽️ Restaurants
🧖 Spas & Wellness
🦁 Safaris
🥾 Hiking & Nature
Why partner with WowBox?
Everything you need to grow your business through gifting.
🎯

Premium audience

Our customers are gift-givers actively looking to spend on quality experiences — hotels, dining, wellness and adventure.

💸

Guaranteed payment

You get paid when a customer redeems their voucher. No chasing invoices, no cancellations — just confirmed revenue.

📊

Your own dashboard

Validate vouchers instantly, track redemptions and monitor your performance — all in one place, from any device.

🚀

Zero upfront cost

Listing on WowBox is completely free. We only succeed when you do — it is a true partnership.

🌍

National reach

WowBox customers are spread across South Africa. Reach people in Cape Town, Johannesburg, Durban and beyond.

⭐

Curated and trusted

We hand-pick every experience on the platform. Being listed signals quality to thousands of discerning customers.

How it works
Up and running in minutes.
1

Create your profile

Register your business, add photos and describe your offering. Our team reviews and approves within 24 hours.

2

Get discovered

Your experience appears in WowBox gift packs matched to your category and region.

3

Welcome your guests

Scan or enter the customer's WB code in your Partner Portal to confirm the booking.

4

Get paid

Payment is processed automatically after validation. Funds transferred within 2 business days.

Ready to grow your business?

Join hundreds of South African experience providers already on WowBox. Create your partner account in minutes — our team will review and approve your listing within 24 hours.

Recommendations

Increase weekend availability

67% of bookings occur Fri–Sun, but only 40% of your slots are available then. Opening 3 more weekend slots/month could add an estimated +R8,740/month.

Pricing opportunity

Similar experiences in Stellenbosch are priced 18% higher. Your ★ 4.9 rating justifies the increase. Estimated uplift: +R5,200/month.

A boost could unlock the next tier

You're 13 bookings from Gold tier (+2% commission rate). Based on your 3.1× historical boost conversion, activating a boost this week could bridge that gap.

Commissions

Configure commission rates. Priority: experience-level → partner-level → global default.
